activities.instructions: Choose the word that correctly introduces the time expression.
activities.prompt: We've lived in this flat ___ six years.
activities.explanation: «Six years» es un periodo de duración, por lo que usamos «for».

activities.instructions: Choose the word that correctly introduces the time expression.
activities.prompt: Mina has worked here ___ 2022.
activities.explanation: «2022» identifica el punto de inicio y requiere «since».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct present perfect form.
activities.prompt: I ___ Sam for a long time.
activities.explanation: La relación continúa y «known» es el participio de «know».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct duration question.
activities.prompt: Ask when someone's ownership of a bicycle began.

options.text: How long have you had that bicycle?
How long do you have that bicycle?
Since when you had that bicycle?
How many time have you that bicycle?

activities.explanation: Una posesión que continúa se pregunta con «How long have you had ...?».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct completion.
activities.prompt: The café has been closed ___ Monday.
activities.explanation: «Monday» es el momento en que comenzó el cierre.

activities.instructions: Choose the word that correctly introduces the time expression.
activities.prompt: We haven't used the meeting room ___ several weeks.
activities.explanation: «Several weeks» mide una duración y se introduce con «for».

activities.instructions: Choose the word that correctly introduces the time expression.
activities.prompt: Tariq has owned this shop ___ he left college.
activities.explanation: La oración «he left college» marca el acontecimiento inicial y va detrás de «since».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct form in the clause after «since».
activities.prompt: I've worked from home since I ___ to this town.
activities.explanation: El acontecimiento inicial terminado usa past simple: «since I moved».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct present perfect form.
activities.prompt: How long ___ Amir ___ in customer support?
activities.explanation: Con «Amir» usamos «has», seguido del participio «worked».

activities.instructions: Choose the sentence that describes a situation continuing now.
activities.prompt: Leila started teaching at this school ten years ago and still teaches there.

options.text: Leila has taught at this school for ten years.
Leila taught at this school for ten years.
Leila has teach at this school since ten years.
Leila is knowing the school for ten years.

activities.explanation: Como el trabajo continúa, usamos present perfect con «for ten years».

activities.instructions: Choose the sentence that correctly describes a finished period.
activities.prompt: We moved away from Bristol in 2020 after living there for eight years.

options.text: We lived in Bristol for eight years.
We have lived in Bristol for eight years.
We have been living in Bristol since eight years.
We live in Bristol for eight years ago.

activities.explanation: La residencia terminó en 2020, por eso usamos past simple aunque aparezca «for».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct completion.
activities.prompt: It's been three months ___ I last drove.
activities.explanation: La estructura es «It has been + periodo + since + past simple».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct duration expression.
activities.prompt: Nora has known her closest friend ___ primary school.
activities.explanation: «Primary school» funciona aquí como el punto o etapa inicial de la relación.

activities.instructions: Choose the grammatically correct sentence.
activities.prompt: Select the natural way to describe long-term ownership that continues now.

options.text: We've had this sofa since we moved in.
We've been having this sofa since we have moved in.
We have this sofa for we moved in.
We had this sofa since we move in.

activities.explanation: La posesión usa present perfect simple y el acontecimiento tras «since» usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Choose the sentence in which «during» is used correctly.
activities.prompt: The course ended last month. You met your project partner while it was taking place.

options.text: I met my project partner during the course.
I've known my partner during three years.
I've owned this laptop during last June.

activities.explanation: «During» sitúa el encuentro dentro del curso; no mide la duración de un estado.

activities.instructions: Choose the correct completion.
activities.prompt: The alarm system hasn't worked properly ___ the power cut.
activities.explanation: «The power cut» identifica el acontecimiento que inició el problema.

activities.instructions: Choose the correct completion.
activities.prompt: Neither lift has been available ___ more than forty-eight hours.
activities.explanation: «More than forty-eight hours» es una duración y requiere «for».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct form after «since».
activities.prompt: The river has been cleaner since the factory ___ its new filters.
activities.explanation: La instalación es el acontecimiento inicial terminado, por eso usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.
activities.prompt: A subscription began in March and remains active.

options.text: The subscription has been active since March.
The subscription was active for March.
The subscription has active since March.
The subscription is active since March ago.

activities.explanation: El estado continúa y «March» marca su inicio: «has been active since March».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct duration question.
activities.prompt: Ask about the length of time the road has been closed.

options.text: How long has the road been closed?
How long the road has been closed?
How long is the road closed since?
For how long does the road been closed?

activities.explanation: La pregunta coloca «has» antes del sujeto y conserva «been closed».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that correctly distinguishes an ongoing state from its starting event.
activities.prompt: I still trust my adviser. That trust began when she helped me resolve my first case.

options.text: I've trusted my adviser since she helped me resolve my first case.
I trusted my adviser since she has helped me resolve my first case.
I've been trusting my adviser for she helped my first case.
I trust my adviser during she helped me resolve my first case.

activities.explanation: El estado vigente usa present perfect; el hecho inicial tras «since» usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Choose the sentence with the same meaning.
activities.prompt: I last spoke to Ana eighteen months ago.

options.text: I haven't spoken to Ana for eighteen months.
I haven't spoken to Ana since eighteen months.
I didn't speak to Ana for eighteen months ago.
I haven't been knowing Ana during eighteen months.

activities.explanation: El periodo sin hablar continúa hasta ahora y «eighteen months» va con «for».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct completion.
activities.prompt: It ___ nearly a decade since the bridge last required major repairs.
activities.explanation: La estructura de tiempo transcurrido es «It has been + periodo + since...».

activities.instructions: Choose the grammatically correct sentence.
activities.prompt: Select the sentence that describes continuing ownership by an organisation.

options.text: The charity has owned the building for most of its history.
The charity has been owning the building since most of its history.
The charity owns the building for its history ago.
The charity has owned the building during twenty years since.

activities.explanation: «Own» es de estado y usa present perfect simple; «most of its history» es un periodo.

activities.instructions: Choose the sentence that correctly contrasts two time periods.
activities.prompt: The old office closed after five years. The current office opened in 2021 and remains open.

options.text: We used the old office for five years, and we've used the current one since 2021.
We've used the old office since five years, and we used the current one for 2021.
We have used both offices during five years since 2021.
We used the old office since five years, and use the current one for 2021.

activities.explanation: El periodo terminado usa past simple con «for»; el vigente usa present perfect con «since».
